response:
**Quick TL‑DR**

| Line | What it does | Why it’s risky / problematic | How to fix / improve |
|------|--------------|-----------------------------|----------------------|
| `app.use(cors({ origin: '*' }));` | Allows **any** web site to make AJAX/fetch calls to your API. | • Opens the door to CSRF‑style data leakage if you ever rely on cookies or HTTP
